title: Conditional Leibniz Derivative Estimation with an Application to American Call Min-Options
abstract: arXiv:2606.27046v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: Leibniz derivative estimation is a Monte Carlo technique for estimating derivatives of a discontinuous sample performance in stochastic models with respect to parameters of interest. By combining the push-out likelihood ratio (LR) method with Leibniz integral rules, it generalizes a broad class of existing LR-based derivative estimators. However, as an LR-based method, its variance is often higher than that of perturbation analysis-based methods and may grow linearly with the dimension of the stochastic input whose distribution depends on the parameter. In this paper, we propose a recursive conditioning approach and combine it with the Leibniz derivative estimation framework. The resulting conditional Leibniz estimator does not involve LR terms and therefore is not subject to variance growth with the input dimension. It also has a simple form and is easy to implement. We apply the method to an American call min-option model, and simula

Title: Conditional Leibniz Derivative Estimation with an Application to American Call Min-Options
Abstract: arXiv:2606.27046v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: Leibniz derivative estimation is a Monte Carlo technique for estimating derivatives of a discontinuous sample performance in stochastic models with respect to parameters of interest. The resulting conditional Leibniz estimator does not involve LR terms and therefore is not subject to variance growth with the input dimension. It also has a simple form and is easy to implement. We apply the method to an American call min-option model, and simula
translated_title: 条件莱布尼茨导数估计及其在美国看涨最小期权中的应用
translated_abstract: 莱布尼茨导数估计是一种蒙特卡洛技术，用于在随机模型中估计不连续样本性能相对于感兴趣参数的导数。通过将推出似然比（LR）方法与莱布尼茨积分规则相结合，它推广了一类广泛的基于LR的导数估计器。然而，作为一种基于LR的方法，其方差通常高于基于扰动分析的方法，并且可能随着其分布依赖于参数的随机输入维数线性增长。在本文中，我们提出了一种递归条件方法，并将其与莱布尼茨导数估计框架相结合。由此产生的条件莱布尼茨估计器不涉及LR项，因此不会因输入维数而出现方差增长。它还具有形式简单、易于实现的特点。我们将该方法应用于美国看涨最小期权模型，并通过仿真验证了其性能。
tldr: 本文提出一种结合递归条件方法的条件莱布尼茨导数估计器，避免了传统LR方法的方差随输入维数增长问题，并成功应用于美国看涨最小期权模型。
en_tdlr: This paper proposes a conditional Leibniz derivative estimator combined with recursive conditioning, which avoids variance growth with input dimension inherent in traditional LR methods, and applies it to an American call min-option model.
